Fog the mirror in the bath, rising on a misty path.
Slip and slide upon the street, freezing cold beneath your feet.
Burn with orange and with red, a hot and glowing ember bed.
Slide your hand across the glass, watching how the minutes pass.
Try to cut but I am dull, I cannot pierce the heavy hull.
Pet the kitty, touch the cloud, soft and white and very proud.
Rub the paper on the wood, scratching like you knew I should.
Touch the beard upon his face, a scratchy and a hairy place.
Win the race and take the gold, the greatest story ever told.
Come in last and lose the game, hanging down your head in shame.
See me here and see me there, I am found most everywhere.
See my face on every screen, the biggest star you've ever seen.
Start to learn and try your best, putting skills to the test.
Hide the card inside your sleeve, a magic lie that you weave.
Tell a joke and make them grin, a clever way to help you win.
Use your brain to find the truth, a puzzle for the old and youth.
Think and solve inside your head, remembering what teacher said.
Do the job with perfect skill, working with an iron will.
